LanguageData.VEE_AnimalPodCrash.label: animal transport pod crash
LanguageData.VEE_BattleAnimalsWanderIn.label: battle animals wander in
LanguageData.VEE_CaravanAnimalsWanderIn.label: caravan animals wander in
LanguageData.VEE_Cargopodsapparel.label: cargo pods (apparel)
LanguageData.VEE_Cargopodsweapons.label: cargo pods (weapons)
LanguageData.VEE_CropSprout.label: crop sprout
LanguageData.VEE_Drought.label: drought
LanguageData.VEE_Drought.letterText: An unusual drought has set in.\n\nDrought is devastating for plant life and will quickly prevent all the crops not planted in hydroponics or high fertility soil to grow.
LanguageData.VEE_Earthquake.label: earthquake
LanguageData.VEE_GlobalWarming.label: global warming
LanguageData.VEE_GlobalWarming.letterText:
Global temperatures have suddenly risen to dangerous levels.
Flora and Fauna is suffering from these changes as biomes shift into their warmer counterparts. Resources become scarce, forcing factions into conflict.
It will last anywhere between a season to several years.
LanguageData.VEE_HailStorm.label: hail storm
LanguageData.VEE_HailStorm.letterText: A freak, small scale hail storm is ravaging the local area. Any person or creature not hiding under the roof risks getting injured by ice pellets. Get some blunt resistant armour!
LanguageData.VEE_HuntingParty.label: hunting party
LanguageData.VEE_IceAge.label: ice age
LanguageData.VEE_IceAge.letterText:
Atmospheric composition of the planet drastically changed resulting in a significant drop in temperature.
Flora and Fauna is suffering from these changes as biomes shift into their colder counterparts. Resources become scarce, forcing factions into conflict.
It will last anywhere between a season to several years.
LanguageData.VEE_LongNight.label: long night
LanguageData.VEE_LongNight.letterText:
A space entity of unimaginable size has covered a local star, resulting in a long lasting eclipse.
Terrified of this supernatural phenomenon, other factions will use this time to wage war and conflict across the surface.
It will last anywhere between a season to several years.
LanguageData.VEE_MeteoriteShower.label: meteorite shower
LanguageData.VEE_MeteoriteShower.letterText: Several large meteorites have struck ground in the area. They left behind large lumps of resources.
LanguageData.VEE_PsychicBloom.label: psychic bloom
LanguageData.VEE_PsychicBloom.letterText:
A strong psychic pulse emitted by a long forgotten entity changed the very genetical structure of local flora. Whilst the sky filled with a seemingly endless auroras, colourful flowers started sprouting everywhere.
All pawns will gain a positive mood buff for the time of the event. The rapidly spreading flowers will overgrow everything, including your fields.
It will last anywhere between a few days to a season.
LanguageData.VEE_PsychicRain.label: psychic rain
LanguageData.VEE_PsychicRain.letterText:
A dangerous psychic entity caused disturbance on subatomic levels, resonating across all particles of the atmosphere.
A seemingly endless supernatural rain has begun, altering the very composition of time. Any person or creature not under the roof will age significantly faster.
It will last anywhere between a season to several years.
LanguageData.VEE_ShuttleCrash.label: shuttle crash
LanguageData.VEE_SpaceBattle.label: space battle
LanguageData.VEE_WildMenWanderIn.label: wild men wander in
LanguageData.VEE_SpaceBattle.letterText: Several massive spaceships have engaged in combat in the planet’s orbit. Missed shots and debris can impact the ground in the area. This can lead to massive fires.
LanguageData.AnimalInsanityMassPurple.label: mass animal insanity
LanguageData.ManhunterPackPurple.label: manhunter pack
LanguageData.RaidEnemyPurple.label: enemy raid ice age
LanguageData.VEE_WandererJoinTraitor.label: wanderer join
LanguageData.VEE_WandererJoinTraitor.letterText: A {PAWN_kind} named {PAWN_nameDef} has arrived and is joining the colony. {PAWN_pronoun} is a {PAWN_title}.\n\n[PAWN_pronoun] is willing to contribute, but will not leave voluntarily. If you don't want {PAWN_nameDef}, you can banish {PAWN_objective}, sell {PAWN_objective} into slavery, or simply kill {PAWN_objective}. However, your other colonists may find this disturbing.
LanguageData.VSE_Reinforcements.label: reinforcements
LanguageData.DrunkMuffalos.label: drunk muffalos
LanguageData.DrunkMuffalosLTS.label: drunk muffalos
LanguageData.ProtectionFee.label: protection fee demand
LanguageData.ProtectionFeeLTS.label: protection fee demand
LanguageData.VSIE_OneNightStand.label: one night stand
LanguageData.VME_JunkChunkDrop.label: junk chunk drop
LanguageData.GR_ManhunterMonstrosities.label: roaming monstrosities
LanguageData.VPE_EltexMeteorite.label: eltex meteorite
LanguageData.VPE_EltexMeteorite.letterText: A large meteorite has struck ground in the area. It has left behind a lump of eltex. Eltex can be used to create psyfocus-enhancing gear, or sold to the Empire to gain honor.
LanguageData.VFEE_GiveQuest_EndGame_Stellarch.label: stellarch ascent
LanguageData.VAEWaste_WasteAnimalsWanderIn.label: waste animals wander in
LanguageData.VRE_BloodMoon.label: blood moon
LanguageData.VFED_GiveQuest_ChasedDeserter.label: imperial deserter
LanguageData.VFED_ImperialPatrol.label: imperial patrol
LanguageData.VFED_PropagandaDrop.label: imperial propaganda drop
LanguageData.VFED_PropagandaDrop.letterText: Cargo pods are crashing nearby. They seem to contain imperial propaganda, advertising how life under the imperial rule is full of wonders. The leaflets seem to mention a new deserter-reporting system with great rewards. It will take a long time to clean up, and anyone cleaning these leaflets will suffer a mood penalty and lose certainty in their way.
LanguageData.VFED_Raid_Absolver.label: absolver raid
LanguageData.Spaceports_KesslerSyndrome.label: kessler syndrome
LanguageData.Spaceports_TraderShuttleArrival.label: trader shuttle arrival
LanguageData.Spaceports_VisitorShuttleArrival.label: visitor shuttle arrival
LanguageData.Spaceports_InterstellarDerelict.label: interstellar derelict
LanguageData.Spaceports_MedevacReward.label: medevac reward
LanguageData.Spaceports_MysteryCargo.label: mysterious cargo
LanguageData.Spaceports_PrisonerTransfer.label: prisoner transfer
LanguageData.Spaceports_ShuttleMedevac.label: shuttle medevac
LanguageData.Spaceports_SpicyPawnLending.label: professional help needed
LanguageData.VFEM_PillageRaid.label: raid (pillage)
LanguageData.VFEM_PillageRaid.letterText: A group of pillagers have arrived nearby. They will use torches to set your base ablaze. They are not interested in fighting and only want to steal your property and burn down your houses.
LanguageData.VisitorGroupSpacerCruise.label: visitor group spacer cruise
LanguageData.VisitorGroupSpacerLuxury.label: visitor group spacer luxury
LanguageData.VGE_AsteroidShower.label: asteroid shower
LanguageData.VGE_Comet.label: comet
LanguageData.VGE_DustCloud.label: dust cloud
LanguageData.VGE_EscapePodCrash.label: escape pod crash
LanguageData.VGE_GravitationalAnomaly.label: gravitational anomaly
LanguageData.VGE_MicrometeorStorm.label: micrometeor storm
LanguageData.VGE_SpaceDebris.label: space debris
LanguageData.VGE_SpaceDebris.letterText: A drifting cloud of ancient wreckage has crossed our flight path. Pieces of metal and scrap hurtle past the ship. Some will miss, others might not.\n\nThe debris will pass us by in about 12 hours.
LanguageData.VGE_SpaceSolarFlare.label: solar flare
LanguageData.VGE_ToxicDustCloud.label: toxic dust cloud
LanguageData.VEE_Alphabeavers.label: alphabeavers
LanguageData.VEE_Aurora.label: aurora
LanguageData.VEE_FertileRains.label: fertile rains
LanguageData.VEE_FertileRains.letterText: Unusually nutrient-rich rainfall is sweeping across the region, boosting plant growth for its duration.
LanguageData.VEE_Infestation.label: infestation
LanguageData.VEE_Infestation.letterText:
Giant insects are tunneling towards you! They will break through in a few seconds and plant hives.

The hives will spawn more insects and more hives.

If you don't want the insects to infest the whole area, destroy the hives. But beware - the bugs will defend their home.
LanguageData.VEE_MigratoryHerds.label: herd migration
LanguageData.VEE_MigratoryHerds.letterText: A group of {0} is passing through the area.\n\nThey won't attack unless provoked.
LanguageData.VEE_TidalFloodingIncident.label: tidal flooding
LanguageData.VEE_TornadoAlley.label: tornado
LanguageData.TowerContamination.label: tower contamination
LanguageData.TowerContamination.letterText: A water tower has become polluted, this poses a serious risk to the health of your colonists! Drain the tower to clear the contamination, or build a water treatment system.
